{{CargoClone
|name=Executioner
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=108
|gene1={race} ATK +50
|gene2={race} FAME +50
|gene3=Each round, {race} ATK +30
|gene4=Per 60 Mecha Minions in battle,
Troop Fire DMG +6
|gene5=When in Mecha Form:
> Gain +1.5% Tool Chests in explorations
|gene6=Per 60 Mecha Minions in battle,
Troop Fire DMG +10
|gene7=When in Mecha Form:
> Gain +2.5% Tool Chests in explorations
|}}
